name: Garlic Chicken Fillets in Balsamic Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 2 Lbs. Chicken Breast Halves, boneless & skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge chicken in flour; remove excess.
2. In a large heavy non-stick skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
3. Cook chicken on each side for 2-3 minutes, or until golden.
4. Add stock, vinegar, and pepper to the skillet.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook 5-10 minutes, or until chicken is tender.
6. Remove chicken from the skillet and keep warm.
7. In a small bowl, dissolve cornstarch in water, stirring until smooth.
8. Add the cornstarch mixture to the skillet and cook 1-2 minutes, stirring, until thick and smooth.
9. Pour the sauce over chicken and serve.
